creator: vanderh@ecf.utoronto.ca
text:
On Sat, Jul 24, 1999 at 06:36:44AM -0400, Bill Fumerola wrote:
 > 
 > > sed 's/^X//' >helloworld/Makefile << 'END-of-helloworld/Makefile'
 > > X# New ports collection makefile for:   oneko
 > > X# Ports collection makefile for:  hello
 
 Something also looks a little wrong in one of the above-two lines,
 too.  :-)
 
 At least you read the handbook.  :)
 
 
 > > X	it is protected by the GNU General Public License, users
 > > X	are free to share and change it.
 > 
 > "Because it is restricted by the GNU General Public License, users
 > aren't free to change and not share it"
 
 Hmm...  You [Bill] feel like going through all the pkg/DESCRs and
 changing them appropriately.  ;-)
 
 
 -- 
 This is my .signature which gets appended to the end of my messages.
